overall.description: A first-person view inside a rustic wooden cabin or tavern with a stone fireplace. The camera slowly pans left across the room as a fire burns in the fireplace and then extinguishes, revealing wooden interior details including a bar counter and wall shelves. Game engine footage with warm artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin interior with active stone fireplace

events.description: fire in the stone fireplace extinguishes, reducing warm flickering illumination on the right side of the room

active flames providing warm flickering light and illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rustic wooden cabin interior dominated by a stone fireplace with active flames on the right. The camera slowly pans left across the room, revealing a chandelier, a distant window, and wooden walls. Around the 10-second mark, the fire unexpectedly extinguishes, leaving the fireplace dark.

scene_state.functional_zone: rustic cabin interior with wooden bar and storage shelves

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan left across the room, revealing the wooden bar area and wall-mounted storage shelves

entered.detail: wooden shelves mounted on the left wall holding various bottles and items
large ceramic pot sitting on the bar counter
glass bottles and pottery arranged on the wooden wall shelves

segments.scene_description: With the fireplace now extinguished and exiting the frame, the camera continues its slow leftward pan across the wooden interior. The focus shifts to a wooden bar counter on the left with a ceramic pot, and wall-mounted shelves holding bottles and pottery, all illuminated by the overhead chandelier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rustic wooden cabin that shifts from the warmth of a crackling fire to the quiet stillness of a dimly lit interior. It begins with a view of a stone fireplace filled with active flames on the right, as the camera slowly pans left to reveal a chandelier, a distant window, and weathered wooden walls. As the pan continues, the fire unexpectedly extinguishes, leaving the fireplace dark and causing the primary light source to shift. The scene then expands across the room, moving past the darkened hearth to focus on a wooden bar counter holding a ceramic pot. Finally, the camera settles on wall-mounted shelves filled with bottles and pottery, all illuminated by the soft glow of the overhead chandelier.
